Home / Lore / Factions / True Sons

faction

True Sons

An organized paramilitary faction using former military and JTF expertise, heavy firepower and territorial control in Washington.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Organization and method

The True Sons combine paramilitary organization with territorial ambition. Their JTF-derived expertise makes them more structured than a purely opportunistic street faction. [1]

Role in the campaign

Their control of Capitol Hill and custody of President Ellis place them directly across the Division's effort to restore the national network and government continuity. [2]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    Ubisoft describes the True Sons as paramilitary warlords using combat expertise and overwhelming firepower to dominate enemies and expand territory. [1]

  2. confirmed

    The official faction description says they are led by a ruthless former JTF officer. [1]

  3. confirmed

    During the main campaign, the True Sons hold President Ellis and his encryption key at Capitol Hill before Division Agents retake the site. [2]

Related records

  • Strategic Homeland Divisionopposed to
  • Washington, D.C.located at

Sources

  1. [1] The Division 2 Story & Factions — Ubisoft (undated). Accessed 2026-07-19.
  2. [2] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: The Story So Far — Ubisoft News (2020-02-05). Accessed 2026-07-19.
Editorial status: Leadership succession and later seasonal alliances require a separate versioned update.
